tree.setup: A busy clothing store on a Saturday afternoon. You're holding two shirts and need a fitting room. The fitting room attendant, Auntie Zhong, controls access with the authority of a nightclub bouncer. She counts garments going in, counts garments coming out, and has an opinion about whether that shade of blue suits you.
tree.setup_zh: 周六下午，繁忙的服装店。你拿着两件衬衫想试衣服。试衣间管理员钟阿姨像夜店保安一样控制进出。她数进去多少件，出来多少件，而且会告诉你那个蓝色到底适不适合你。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_en: How many pieces? Let me see.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Tell her what you have and ask about sizes.

options.text_zh: 两件衬衫。请问有没有中号的？
options.text_pinyin: liǎng jiàn chènshān. qǐngwèn yǒu méiyǒu zhōng hào de?
options.text_en: Two shirts. Do you have a medium?
options.feedback: Auntie Zhong takes the shirts, counts them (unnecessarily -- there are clearly two), and hands you a number tag.「中号在那边架子上。」中号 is 'medium size.' 件 is the measure word for upper-body clothing.

options.text_zh: 这件我不知道是什么号的。
options.text_pinyin: zhè jiàn wǒ bù zhīdào shì shénme hào de.
options.text_en: I don't know what size this one is.
options.feedback: Auntie Zhong flips to the tag with practiced speed.「这是大号。你穿什么号？」She can size you up by sight, but she asks anyway. It's protocol.
Auntie Zhong points at the fitting room.「可以，三号间。」可以试吗 is the basic 'can I try this on' -- short and effective.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_pinyin: shì hǎo le ma? héshì ma?

options.text_zh: 这件合适，但是那件有点大。有小一号的吗？
options.text_pinyin: zhè jiàn héshì, dànshì nà jiàn yǒudiǎn dà. yǒu xiǎo yí hào de ma?
options.text_en: This one fits, but that one is a bit big. Do you have one size smaller?
options.feedback: Auntie Zhong is already heading to the rack.「等一下。」She returns with a smaller size in twelve seconds flat. 小一号 means 'one size smaller' -- essential fitting room language.
Auntie Zhong counts the garments coming out (two, confirmed) and hangs them on the return rack with professional composure. 都不太合适 is a polite way to say nothing worked.

options.text_zh: 你觉得这个颜色好看吗？
options.text_pinyin: nǐ juéde zhè ge yánsè hǎokàn ma?
options.text_en: Do you think this color looks good?
options.feedback: Auntie Zhong tilts her head.「说实话？深色的比较好看。」She's honest. You asked. 你觉得 invites an opinion -- be ready for one.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好了，这件很适合你。去收银台吧！
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo le, zhè jiàn hěn shìhé nǐ. qù shōuyíntái ba!
turns.text_en: Great, this one really suits you. Head to the checkout!

tree.cultural_note: Chinese clothing stores often have fitting room attendants who count garments in and out. Sizes often run differently -- always try before buying. Common sizes: 小号 (S), 中号 (M), 大号 (L), 加大号 (XL).
